faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at Maliba Pharmacy College to M.Pharma students?
faqs.answer: Maliba Pharmacy College offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 2.6 LPA to M.Pharma students.

placements.overview:
Maliba Pharmacy College is an institute located in Surat, Gujarat. Maliba Pharmacy College courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Doctorate levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and PCI and offers courses in Full Time mode. Maliba Pharmacy College offers a total of 9 courses in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Pharma, M.Pharma and Pharm.D and the total seat intake for the available courses is 230. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology and Quality Assurance . Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 3,08,000 to 9,24,000 and the average median salary is around INR 2,53,286. Apart from this, the Maliba Pharmacy College campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Maliba Pharmacy College offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Pharma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Pharma. Maliba Pharmacy College courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Maliba Pharmacy College courses stands around INR 3,08,000 to 9,24,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The Institute takes pride in offering its students a median placement salary of INR 2.21 LPA, that underscores its dedication to preparing graduates for prosperous careers by providing them with a noteworthy and competitive compensation package.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfying because of good faculty.

review_content.Placements: From the batch, 40% of the students got placed from the college. The highest package offered is 5 LPA to 6 LPA in my course. There are many companies who come for recruiting. Almost there are many students who go for internships in different companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure of the department are very good. It has high-tech classrooms and labs. The department has its library and there is one common library which has 7 floors. The campus is fully Wi-Fi-enabled. There is a canteen which serves good and tasty food.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Quality Assurance - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Student Life in Maliba campus.

review_content.Placements: In our course, about 70% of seniors got placed. Now, our placements start in February. Top recruiting companies like  Sun Pharma, Alembic, Macleods, Zydus, and Dr. Reddy's visit the college for placements. On campus, Ola, Alembic, Zentiva, etc., also hire students from our course. Companies offer roles in the QA department, PCA department, and R&D.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have so many facilities on our campus like labs, a library with E-books Wi-Fi, a reading area, a conference room, and an NFC system. It also has a playground for games like cricket, football, volleyball, and basketball. It has a sports complex where we have a pool table, table tennis or badminton court.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Student's perspective about college

review_content.Placements: Most students after B. Pharmacy choose to pursue higher studies like M. Pharm and MBA. Very few opt for jobs directly after B. Pharm, so those who do seek jobs generally find placement easily. The average package is about 3 lakh, with the highest package being 4 lakh per annum and the lowest package 2.8 lakh per annum. Preferred recruiting companies include Zentiva, Globela, Cedmac, and others. About 80 to 90 percent of students secure internships with companies affiliated with the college, such as Globela, Yash Pharmaceutical, Sun Pharma, and Cedmac, which provide practical experience.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Maliba Pharmacy College.

review_content.Placements: Pharma.D is a clinical-based program that covers the area of more medical-related things than the industrial sector which is covered under B.Pharma. So the placements in the course through college are less due to less awareness of the Pharma.D profession in India. The packages are not offered by the college but it is on the skill and knowledge of a Pharma.D professional according to that one gets placed in hospitals and accordingly, the package is offered. As Pharma.D is a more clinical-based program so companies don't recruit any the person needs to try on its own to get placed in any big multi-specialty hospital like Apollo, etc. The course of Pharma.D is started at this college, so the first batch of Pharma.D is not passed out as the course duration is 6 years and totally for internship and college will provide that. Top roles of Pharma.D professionals are in clinical fields like clinical pharmacist, pharmacovigilance, and research work, etc.

college_info.intro:
JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research offers postgraduate, certificate and PhD programmes in several disciplines. The popular programmes at JISIASR include MSc and MTech, offered at the PG level. Most of the MSc and MTech courses are offered in full-time mode, for a duration of two years. The MSc programme is offered in various specialisations such as Microbiology, Paint & Coating Technology, Polymer Science & Technology, Chemistry, and others. Whereas, the MTech programme is offered in several branches such as Computer Science & Engineering and Data Science, among others.
JISIASR offers a research-based and industry-centric curriculum to prepare students for all the industry challenges. The institute boasts state-of-the-art laboratories for advanced research and offers strong placement assistance to students. The JIS Institute of Advanced Research and Studies collaborates with many academic institutes and industries to organise various academic training programmes and to generate internship opportunities for students.
Students can explore the listed programs offered by JISIASR for the 2025-26 academic session and embark on your journey to a future-proof career in the industry or academia.
Candidates can check the JISIASR popular programmes along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research provides numerous PG, diploma and PhD programmes in the streams of Data Science, Health Science & Technology, Interdisciplinary Sciences, and Renewable & Sustainable Energy Studies. At the PG level, JISIASR offers MSc and MTech programmes in various specialisations. Through its different centres, the institute offers a PhD programme in several areas of research such as bioinformatics, microbiology, medicinal chemistry, renewable energy & applications, and data science applications, among others. Some of the popular MSc specialisations offered at JISIASR Kolkata are mentioned below:

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seat intake of PhD courses at JISIASR, JIS University is 40. The institute offers over ten specialisations under PhD courses. Candidates should pass MSc/MTech/BTech or other relevant degrees are eligible to apply for admission. After the fulfillment of the eligibility criteria, candidates have to visit the official website of JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research to apply online.
faqs.question: What is the seat intake for PhD at JISIASR, JIS University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, JISIASR, JIS University requires at least 50% aggregate in MSc/BE/BTech/MTech/MPharm. If any student passes another entrance-level exam related to the field, they are also eligible for the course. The institute accepts various National Level Exams for admission to PhD courses including SIR/UGC/DBT/ICMR/GATE/INSPIRE/ JGEEBILS / RGNF.So if any candidates want admission to JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research for PhD course they must have 50% in under graduation or post-graduation degree.
faqs.question: Can I do a PhD with 40% graduation in JISIASR, JIS University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, there is no entrance exam needed for admission to JISIASR, JIS University. The institute offers merit-based admission. If applicants want admission to PG courses they must complete graduation degree with 50% aggregate. Additionally,  applicants who want admission to PhD courses in the JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research must have MSc/ MTech/ BTech or equivalent with a 50% aggregate score. Further, the college also accepts various National Levels exams which include CSIR/UGC/DBT/ICMR/GATE/INSPIRE/ JGEEBILS / RGNF.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to JISIASR, JIS University?

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Polymer Science and Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a unique research institute in eastern India, and it provides huge opportunities.

content.Placements: Institute is relatively new, but it has got tie-ups with premier institutes and universities in India and abroad like IIT Kharagpur, Mahatma Gandhi University, Pohang Institute of Technology, South Korea, etc., and other Industries like IPA, rubber industries, pharmaceutical industries, etc. So there are high chances of getting placed in these reputed industries and universities after completion of the course. Some students already got placed as research interns.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories are well-equipped with high tech instruments which are helpful for students and researchers to carry out their research works. The institute is well-equipped with computer labs and wet labs. Classrooms are good here. There is a centralised Wi-Fi system. The JIS University have dedicated hostels for their students, and there are a lot of PGs in the vicinity of the institute at Salt Lake. So, finding any living accommodations would not be an issue here.

content.Infrastructure: The institute is well structured. Labs with modern instruments and classrooms with modern facilities are available. High-speed Wi-Fi is available. Labs have hi-tech, new and costly instruments. There is also an online and offline library. Overall, it is very good.

admission_overview.college_name: JISIASR Course Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research admission 2025is currently open. The institute offers MSc, MTech, MS and PhD courses. To get admission to the JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Students will be admitted for courses based on merit. However, candidates who qualify for national-level exams such as CSIR/ UGC/ DBT/ ICMR/ GATE/ INSPIRE/ JGEEBILS/ RGNF are given a preference in PhD admissions. It is aprivate instituteand is affiliated with theJIS University. The application process at theJIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Researchis conducted online. The mode of study at JISIASR, JIS University courses is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. Read the following article to know more aboutJIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research course admission2025.

JISIASR, JIS University courses admission are based on merit. candidates who qualify for national-level exams such as CSIR/ UGC/ DBT/ ICMR/ GATE/ INSPIRE/ JGEEBILS/ RGNF are given a preference in PhD admissions at JIS Institute of Advanced Studies and Research. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria at

JISIASR admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in JISIASR, JIS University:
STEP 1: JISIASR Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Students will be selected based on Merit for all the courses. Aspirants must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college as per respective courses. However, candidates who have valid scores ofCSIR/ UGC/DBT/ICMR/GATE/INSPIRE/JGEEBILS/RGNF will be given preference.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

review_content.Placements: As a Pharm D student, we don't have placements in the industry; however, our college has a tie-up with KEM Hospital in Pune, one of the most well-known hospitals in the area, for internships. review_summary.college_name: PES Modern College of Pharmacy (For Ladies) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2032
individual_reviews.title: Faculty, staff, infrastructure, facilities, and library are all good.

content.Placements: Till now, no student from this course has received an internship. I hope there will be future demand for this course because Pharma.D is a highly professional course in the healthcare field. Companies hire for roles in pharmacovigilance, regulatory affairs, medical affairs, clinical research, and drug safety.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure at our college are very well-planned. The classrooms are clean and neat, with smart classrooms, projectors, comfortable seating, and good ventilation. There are separate labs, good computer facilities, a good hostel area, and sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with all the facilities, faculty members, and events.

content.Placements: Being a Pharma. D student, there will be no placement as the hospital will not come to the college and say that they need a clinical pharmacist. But the students willing to work in the industry can find placement opportunities. The placement available for B.Pharma and M.Pharma students are also made available for Doctor of Pharmacy students.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are much better. One room with four beds, 2 cupboards, 2 drawers, and 1 computer table for each student, and one shared table along with that. A shoe rack is also available. Rooms are much bigger with proper cleaning facilities. Rooms are cleaned on a daily basis. A washing machine is also available. As for food, we get morning breakfast with tea, lunch, evening snacks with tea, and dinner. Overall, the mess is better compared to nearby messes.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very good for Pharm D students.

content.Placements: As a Pharm D student, we don't have placements in the industry; however, our college has a tie-up with KEM Hospital in Pune, one of the most well-known hospitals in the area, for internships. For B Pharm final-year students, there are good placements available, which depend entirely on the interview process, and our faculty provides guidance for this.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for our Pharm D course are very good, featuring clean, spacious classrooms with proper ventilation, along with a separate library dedicated to Pharm D students. The hostel is also quite good; as a resident, I can take full advantage of the amenities provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college.

content.Placements: In our college, 50% of students are placed before completion of graduation. The average package is 3 LPA. Credence is a healthcare company. Almost 100% of students got internships from different industries like Emcure, Nulife, and Haffkin. The top role offered is AR executive.
content.Infrastructure: There is an LCD in every classroom experienced staff, a clean lab, different labs for different subjects, and a library also available. The food is also good the hygiene is maintained, and every day different dishes are available. Gym facilities are available 24/7. Security and medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Disappointing experience

content.Placements: Our college don't give placement, placement are given to only 2-3 students out of 100 students in a batch . Only 1-2 companies come in our college, College does not provide internship , if students get placement through college then Annual package of student is not more than 3-4 LPA
content.Infrastructure: College labs are not in good conditions, most of chemicals of college labs are expired , equipments of labs don't work Professor discriminate while giving marks(internals) to students , Infrastructure of hostel is very nice , hostel looks like 5 star hotel , since it is recently build , and hostel has many facilities that aren't available in normal college hostel , quality of food in hostel message is okay -okay , But hostel has not good medical facilities, otherwise hostel rooms are very nice and spacious

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I would recommend opting for this course.

review_content.Placements: Around 100 girls and 25 boys got internships from our college in famous hospitals like Homecare International, Positive Homeocare, etc. The top role offered is a medical officer in various districts and recognised hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have clean and spacious labs. Our college provides facilities like a canteen, sports with leagues, university-level games, a library, digitalised classrooms, separate departments for each subject, etc. The quality of the food is slightly different. Our college provides good medical facilities and good treatment for patients.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has the highest outpatient number compared to other BHMS colleges in Telangana.

review_content.Placements: Our course is a five-and-a-half year course. Our college is the number one college in Telangana with almost 500 to 600 patients visiting daily. There was no spoon-feeding. Every student became a doctor from scratch with a lot of clinical exposure.
review_content.Infrastructure: We had an outpatient block. The college had separate blocks with an open auditorium, spacious grounds, and a closed auditorium. Every classroom had a projector, a good seating structure, and good ventilation. The girls' hostel had good infrastructure with a separate dining area. The cooking area was good with hygienic washrooms that were maintained perfectly. The hostel food was quite good and nutritious.

review_summary.college_name: J.S.P.S. Government Homoeopathic Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 75-80% of students got placed in our course. Around 60-75% of students got internships from our course. Many top roles are offered to post-graduation and master of degree students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of classrooms, labs, and the library is not good. The hostel facilities are good. The quality of the food in the mess and canteen is very good. Medical facilities are available in our college. Our college encourages games and sports. Sports and games are available in our college.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are good, helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is below average. The course makes students doctors. Exams are very difficult. The pass percentage is 65%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good college life. Dissatisfied about placements.

content.Placements: Average package is around 40k per month. The roles offered in our course are lecturers and doctor. We can open our own clinic after getting the degree Certificate from the university. You have to work hard and you have to score well to get a government job.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is good. Library is good. Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are clean. The quality of food is good. The sports are conducted once in a year. There is a small canteen in the campus surroundings. The food is good but sometimes, you have to adjust.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend opting for this course.

content.Placements: Around 100 girls and 25 boys got internships from our college in famous hospitals like Homecare International, Positive Homeocare, etc. The top role offered is a medical officer in various districts and recognised hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: We have clean and spacious labs. Our college provides facilities like a canteen, sports with leagues, university-level games, a library, digitalised classrooms, separate departments for each subject, etc. The quality of the food is slightly different. Our college provides good medical facilities and good treatment for patients.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has the highest outpatient number compared to other BHMS colleges in Telangana.

content.Placements: Our course is a five-and-a-half year course. Our college is the number one college in Telangana with almost 500 to 600 patients visiting daily. There was no spoon-feeding. Every student became a doctor from scratch with a lot of clinical exposure.
content.Infrastructure: We had an outpatient block. The college had separate blocks with an open auditorium, spacious grounds, and a closed auditorium. Every classroom had a projector, a good seating structure, and good ventilation. The girls' hostel had good infrastructure with a separate dining area. The cooking area was good with hygienic washrooms that were maintained perfectly. The hostel food was quite good and nutritious.

individual_reviews.course: MD Homeopathy in Repertory - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a good government college.

content.Placements: Placements depend on our merit and skills. In order to get government jobs, we need to crack competitive exams and it depends on us. It is not like a typical B.Tech course to get placed on campus. But Many of my lecturers are alumni of this college, so I guess I can say in that aspect it has good placements. Overall, it depends on the competitive exams we give and reservation all matters.
content.Infrastructure: It is a government college, so do not expect something lavish. The infrastructure is good compared to other government colleges. I feel there are sufficient classrooms as I see many of our seniors who are final years don't have proper classrooms to sit in, and they come to sit in our classes. Compared to other government colleges, it is good only.

The Institute provides 1 library facility with capacity of 1000 books and 1500 journals

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classrooms, labs, and the library is not good. The hostel facilities are good. The quality of the food in the mess and canteen is very good. Medical facilities are available in our college. Our college encourages games and sports. Sports and games are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college life. Dissatisfied about placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is good. Library is good. Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are clean. The quality of food is good. The sports are conducted once in a year. There is a small canteen in the campus surroundings. The food is good but sometimes, you have to adjust.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend opting for this course.
reviews.review_text: We have clean and spacious labs. Our college provides facilities like a canteen, sports with leagues, university-level games, a library, digitalised classrooms, separate departments for each subject, etc. The quality of the food is slightly different. Our college provides good medical facilities and good treatment for patients.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the highest outpatient number compared to other BHMS colleges in Telangana.
reviews.review_text: We had an outpatient block. The college had separate blocks with an open auditorium, spacious grounds, and a closed auditorium. Every classroom had a projector, a good seating structure, and good ventilation. The girls' hostel had good infrastructure with a separate dining area. The cooking area was good with hygienic washrooms that were maintained perfectly. The hostel food was quite good and nutritious.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good government college.
reviews.review_text: It is a government college, so do not expect something lavish. The infrastructure is good compared to other government colleges. I feel there are sufficient classrooms as I see many of our seniors who are final years don't have proper classrooms to sit in, and they come to sit in our classes. Compared to other government colleges, it is good only.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has supportive teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has a hospital and laboratories. We have a good library and teaching staff. The food served in our college is very good. Our college has neat classrooms. We have games. All facilities are very good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Hospitality & Travel. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BVSC. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fees for Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University courses range between INR 28,140 to 77,670.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University is approximately INR 28140 - INR 77670.
faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is best for a bachelor's degree in B.Sc. Agri. Hons. The infrastructure and facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: There are 200 students studying on our main campus located at Palanpur Dantiwada, and including sub-branches, we have around 260 seats. There are very few to moderate placements because there is not any big industry present in the locality. In the year 2020, 10 students were placed through campus recruitment with the highest salary package of 13 LPA. The average package is between 2 LPA and 2.5 LPA. The placements are not very impressive because half of the batch apply for PG study. Some students start their own businesses or become entrepreneurs. Top recruiting companies are Agro Star, IDBI Bank, Kisan Sanchar, IFFCO, and some other NGO's. At our college, only about 2% to 3% of students get the opportunity to do an internship. They offer a role as a junior executive bank manager.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with great teachers, good hostels, sports grounds, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 30-35% of students are placed in this course. The average salary pacakge offered is Rs 30,000. They offered roles as company department managers at fertilizer factories, in research fields, etc. Different private companies are there as well as some government companies also.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, there are 3 libraries, separate laboratories for different subjects with all the needed equipment. Wi-Fi facilities are available, air-conditioned classrooms with a capacity of 80 students per class. They a lot 3 students or room with combine washroom between two rooms, food is good and healthy as well as heavy. PHC is there for any type of emergency, and other medical facilities. There are volleyball, basketball, cricket table tennis, badminton, athletics, gym, swimming pool are also available.

answer.text: Professionals in the field of Dairy Technology continuously hunt for fresh and innovative methods for the production and processing of dairy items. They bring together different elements of Chemistry, Microbiology, Engineering, and Nutrition to make sure the final dairy product is healthy, meets the required quality standards, and provides enough nutrition to the people of India, who are highly dependent on milk and its products. review_summary.college_name: Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of SDAU Dantiwada.

content.Placements: In our college, only a few students get jobs in companies, so there are fewer chances of getting placements. Some professors are very nice and help students find jobs. My friend got a job at HDFC Bank with the help of our professor. Top roles available are professor and assistant professor.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are very high-tech, equipped with projectors and TVs for studying. The classes have air conditioning, making it comfortable for both teachers and students. The college organizes sports events like inter-college competitions and cultural contests, with all students participating in many events.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I like our college and am happy for getting admission to this college.

content.Placements: All students need at least 60% in the Gujarat board and 40 marks in GUJCET for admission to our college. In this course, all students need to complete 4 years. There is 3 year of study and one year of internship. The college will give Rs.18000 per month in the internship as a stipend.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel of our college has the best infrastructure of all agriculture colleges. There is a different hostel for boys and girls. There is one mess in our college. They take Rs.2600 per month for food. They give us breakfast in the morning then lunch and dinner.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is best for a bachelor's degree in B.Sc. Agri. Hons. The infrastructure and facilities are good.

content.Placements: There are 200 students studying on our main campus located at Palanpur Dantiwada, and including sub-branches, we have around 260 seats. There are very few to moderate placements because there is not any big industry present in the locality. In the year 2020, 10 students were placed through campus recruitment with the highest salary package of 13 LPA. The average package is between 2 LPA and 2.5 LPA. The placements are not very impressive because half of the batch apply for PG study. Some students start their own businesses or become entrepreneurs. Top recruiting companies are Agro Star, IDBI Bank, Kisan Sanchar, IFFCO, and some other NGO's. At our college, only about 2% to 3% of students get the opportunity to do an internship. They offer a role as a junior executive bank manager.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with great teachers, good hostels, sports grounds, and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 30-35% of students are placed in this course. The average salary pacakge offered is Rs 30,000. They offered roles as company department managers at fertilizer factories, in research fields, etc. Different private companies are there as well as some government companies also.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, there are 3 libraries, separate laboratories for different subjects with all the needed equipment. Wi-Fi facilities are available, air-conditioned classrooms with a capacity of 80 students per class. They a lot 3 students or room with combine washroom between two rooms, food is good and healthy as well as heavy. PHC is there for any type of emergency, and other medical facilities. There are volleyball, basketball, cricket table tennis, badminton, athletics, gym, swimming pool are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy and Food Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied because of the faculty members and good placements.

content.Placements: About 30% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Banas Dairy and HyFun Foods visit our campus for placements. Almost 100% of students from our course got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure. It provides facilities like Wi-Fi, smart classrooms and a library with computers. Library and computer are helpful to us to get new innovative ideas. The mess serves healthy and delicious food. Our college provides good sports equipment.

college_info.college_name: Combined (P.G.) Institute of Medical Sciences and Research: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Established in 2002, Combined (P.G.) Institute of Medical Sciences and Research is located in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. The institute offers courses like B.Sc., M.Sc., PG Diploma, UG Diploma and MHA. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 29 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Mass Communication & Media, Humanities & Social Sciences and Science. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Combined (P.G.) Institute of Medical Sciences and Research offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and Accounting & Commerce. College offers B.Sc., UG Diploma and BPT courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Sc., PG Diploma and MHA.

review_content.Placements: A maximum of 80 to 85 percent of students take their placement in many hospitals as a nursing officer or staff nurse. The starting package of the student was average but increased according to their experience and also provided some kind of facilities like transport.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available on the college campus, good facilities are available in the college for the students. The college campus is good and many types of activities are conducted by the college like dance, conferences, seminars and many types of competition which helps to reduce mental stress.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Exceptional faculty, vibrant campus, diverse opportunities. Unforgettable experience!

review_content.Placements: It depends on students' abilities, but the college provides campus placement. About 70% of students are placed. Starting with 2-5 Lacs. Max Hospital, CMI, Kailash, Apollo, Medanta. The college provides internships, but in physiotherapy, there is a paid internship, so students can do it at any hospital they want.
review_content.Infrastructure: Each department has its own labs, like anatomy, pathology, microbiology, and physiotherapy, exercise therapy, electrotherapy, computer lab, library, etc. The most important thing is that the physiotherapy department has an OPD, so students can see patients from the first year. The canteen serves a variety of delicious and hygienic food options at affordable prices, and the cozy atmosphere makes the canteen popular. The hostel provides a comfortable and secure living environment. The fitness center and gym are well-equipped and accessible, and the college's sports facilities are top-notch.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Nursing (B.Sc. Nursing) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Good campus and placement.

review_content.Placements: Above 70% of students got placement after completing the course. The package starts from 1.5 Lacs/year and goes up to 2.4lakhs/year. Apollo and local hospitals recruit us. All the students got internships in the same companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is good such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library. There is a good canteen and good quality food is available.
review_content.Faculty: If you study well then nothing is hard and if you don't then everything goona feel hard. Every teacher and faculty member is helpful. They love to teach you and appreciate your passion. So don't feel hard to get admission here just got to this college.

answer.text: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

lists: Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. answer.text: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.

lists: Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.
Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.

Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.

Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Rajmata Jijau Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Pharmacy:

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good campus with smart and experienced faculty members.

review_content.Placements: The salary package offered ranges from 3.6 LPA to 5 LPA. Companies like Alfa Laval, Bilcare, Emcure, Biopharma, etc., visit here for recruitment. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I am satisfied with my college, although there are some short, such as language issues.

content.Placements: My batch 1st-year MBBS has a strength of 250 students. Most of my batchmates are day scholars or are from different districts of West Bengal. A few of us are from other states AIQ Bihar, Jharkhand, Chhattisgarh, Arunachal Pradesh, and Rajasthan. Every student gets an internship at the end of the MBBS course.
content.Infrastructure: Since my college was established in 1835, which makes it the oldest medical college in all of Asia, you can't expect that much better infrastructure compared to other newly established colleges. But, it still has its own historic vibe, and the patient load here is very high. Talking about other facilities, the library is well-maintained with free Wi-Fi facility and AC services. Labs are also highly equipped. Hostels are not up to the mark, as you have to share your room with at least two or three people, but some of the new hostels are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: From all points of view, this college teaches us how to enjoy and study parallelly.

content.Placements: 45 percent were placed, with the highest package being 3-4 crore, the lowest between 10-15 lakh, and the average 20 lakh. 90 percent of students got internships from my course, and some work in the same college. Here, every student is very talented, and the faculty also helps us improve our skills, which helps in various fields.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library full day. The labs are okay for doing experiments. The classrooms are also good. A digital board is available. The library is also good for study Hostel is average as other hostels. The food quality is not so good in the mess. There is a ground in the hostel where every game is played: cricket, badminton, football, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied, as it always produce great ranks in NEET PG.

content.Placements: More than 75% students are eligible to their PG course, as the college is famous for academics. Students from our college have great ranks in their PG Entrance, and make the college always proud. Overall, the college is the best.
content.Infrastructure: The institution is renowned for its availability of many hostels. Most of the students get hostels to stay, and have a good life in the college. Hostels have Wi-Fi facilities. Hostel fees is also nominal. Good food quality at affordable price.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An oldest Asian College.

content.Placements: There is no such type of placements in the college as it is a Medical College. The college provides compulsory one year internship to students inside the college campus. The internships makes the student exposed to various cases which will make them an experienced doctor in future.
content.Infrastructure: The College has quite a good infrastructure. The classrooms or the lecture theatre are air conditioned with a microphone and projector. The Library has Wi-Fi connection and also the books are updated. The hostels are also quite good with all the required facilities available for the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Government Medical College, Kolkata is a good college.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The hostel is very neat and clean. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. There are many hostels. Maximum students get hostel facilities. Hostel facilities are good.
content.Faculty: A total of 9 semesters are taken in 4 years, and there are four professional examinations. Three exams are in the first year, two in the second year, and two in the third. As we all know, MBBS is not an easy course. So you have to work hard.
content.Other: To get a degree like this is to serve people. I would like to be a part of this noble profession. Here you can interact with others very easily. Above all, the senior-junior relationship is good here.

reviews.review_heading: This is the oldest heritage of Asia established in 1835 and it is the top medical college of Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus is regularly cleaned. Our college has the largest gyanocologist ward all over Asia (Eden hospital). There are 4 boys hostels and 2 girls hostels for MBBS students. You will see the combination of ancient and modern technology in its infrastructure. But, there is no playground or a gym.

reviews.review_heading: It is the oldest medical college in Asia (est.1834).
reviews.review_text: We have an excellent library (9 am-6 pm) with an unlimited number of medical books. Labs for each department are ventilated well and have adequate resources to teach the students. The hostel mess is quite good (we get breakfast, lunch, evening snacks, and dinner) at a minimal price (Rs.35-60).

reviews.review_heading: MCK is the prime destination for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: Medical College Kolkata is India's first medical college. The rich heritage drives many talented minds every year to study medicine and surgery in our college from across India. Presently we have 2 lecture theatres and one is under construction. Teacher-student ratio is excellent. Labs are good. Library is air-conditioned. We have 5 boys and 1 girls hostel for undergraduate students. Canteen and mess is excellent too. As it is a medical college so you need not worry about your medical facilities...

reviews.review_heading: It is the oldest heritage in Asia.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very high-tech. The labs are well-equipped. There is free Wi-Fi for students in the hostel. The library is full of books. It remains open from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. Mess food is of good quality. They provide free medical facilities for students and their parents. Both indoor and outdoor sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a perfect college if you want to enjoy your college life and excel in your studies.
reviews.review_text: As Asia's first medical institute, its infrastructures are a little worn, but I can promise you that the lecture halls have been well preserved. The library is quite impressive. Inside the academic building, Wi-Fi is also available. The labs are well-kept.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good college, in one word.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure, clean hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good place to become a doctor.
reviews.review_text: This is the top-ranked college in West Bengal so the facilities and the infrastructure availability are excellent. All the classrooms, libraries, and laboratories are well-equipped and modernized. The hostel is clean, and all the mess is open for all the students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy courses are divided into four categories such undergraduate, postgraduate, certificate courses and PhD. However, each category has its different eligibility criteria and fees structure. For UG students, Nitte College of Physiotherapy offers a Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) program with a duration of 4.5 years (including 6 months compulsory internship).

Apart from this, NIPT also offers a PhD program in various disciplines such as Medicine, Dentistry, Pharmacy, Nursing, Biological Science, Physiotherapy, and many more. Below are some of the Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy courses and their fee structure:

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for physiotherapy with good patient exposure.

review_content.Placements: We got patient exposure during our 2nd year, so we observed the patient's condition and treatment for the same. After completing 4 years, we have internships at KS Hegde Medical Hospital for 6 months. We do not get paid for the same.
review_content.Infrastructure: It provides modern and spacious classrooms with projectors and whiteboards. There is a well-stocked library with quiet study space. There are outdoor fields for sports like cricket and football. There are separate hostels for both males and females with good facilities. High-speed Wi-Fi and mental health centers are also available.

reviews_list.review_title: Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy review.

review_content.Placements: There are many future opportunities in this field, and our role in the medical field is increasingly important. There are more opportunities outside India, and you can earn more in another country. Nitte is a very popular and good college in Bangalore.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is very good, with a good selection of books that are useful for students. There are four or five labs that are very useful for students to learn or gain practical knowledge. Wi-Fi is available, and the hostel food is good.

review_summary.college_name: Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college life at the Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy.

content.Placements: At Nitte Institution of Physiotherapy, we have a good campus selection option, and 90% of students get placements based on their performance. The placement package may vary from company to company but there is no less package below 1 LPA. It has better career options.
content.Infrastructure: Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy has the best infrastructure. Classrooms provided are very spacious with high-quality projectors and a Wi-Fi facility. The library is very wide. We can get any books from the library, and we can sit and study the whole day there. The hostel facility has in built mess facilities also. There is an indoor stadium and outdoor ground. We have our own college hospital where the medical facilities are free for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with this college, in my opinion.

content.Placements: About 100 students are there in my class for the bachelor of physiotherapy course. The overall experience is good in this college. College also has a hospital that provides internship opportunities for students in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is very near to college in this area. There is just a 200-meter difference between college and hostel. The quality of hostel, infrastructure, and hospitality is average. Mess is also average.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of our college are very extraordinary. They are very helpful to us and are there with us in every situation and help us when we need them. Our mentors are also helpful whenever we need them or if we are stuck in anything. Semester exams are pretty tough in this college, but we all are making through it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for physiotherapy with good patient exposure.

content.Placements: We got patient exposure during our 2nd year, so we observed the patient's condition and treatment for the same. After completing 4 years, we have internships at KS Hegde Medical Hospital for 6 months. We do not get paid for the same.
content.Infrastructure: It provides modern and spacious classrooms with projectors and whiteboards. There is a well-stocked library with quiet study space. There are outdoor fields for sports like cricket and football. There are separate hostels for both males and females with good facilities. High-speed Wi-Fi and mental health centers are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy review.

content.Placements: There are many future opportunities in this field, and our role in the medical field is increasingly important. There are more opportunities outside India, and you can earn more in another country. Nitte is a very popular and good college in Bangalore.
content.Infrastructure: The library is very good, with a good selection of books that are useful for students. There are four or five labs that are very useful for students to learn or gain practical knowledge. Wi-Fi is available, and the hostel food is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A better college or medical student.

content.Placements: Among 170+ students for the academic year 2019-20, 85% of the eligible candidates are placed across specializations like Finance, Marketing, HR, and Banking services. The highest package is 12 LPA. The lowest package is 5 LPA and the average package is 6 LPA. Top recruiters were Deloitte Consulting, Grant Thornton, KPMG, and South Indian Bank. Around 50% of students have earned internships. The top roles offered during the placements were Supervisor, Executive, and Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: At nitte, it is a great learning experience. It has all facilities on campus. Academics are also very good. The faculty members are so cooperative and supportive. They work hard for us and always welcome everyone to ask anything and discuss any problems one has. Our college has a rich library and a good big lab. The campus is amazing. There are a lot of events and fests and workshops conducted throughout the session which are really interesting and especially career counseling sessions.

admission_process.title: NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy admissionis merit-based. The Institute provides UG and PG programs and the courses offered byNitte Institute of Physiotherapyare Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT), Master of Physiotherapy (MPT), PhD and Certificate courses in Yoga. Admission to this institute is merit-based. The mode of application is online based. Students looking to join the institute need to first make sure that they qualify for the programme by fulfilling the eligibility. Interested candidates can read the following article to know all about the programmes, selection criteria, and admission process for NIPT.

Candidates interested in getting into the NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy are required to follow the NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy application process. Admission into the undergraduate programme is made based on Class 12  marks, while graduation is required for PG admissions. The institute provides the programmes in full-time and regular mode. Check out the below table for details onNITTE Institute of Physiotherapy courseswhich is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:

NIPT course admissionsfor all of its courses are done based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The process mainly commences online. Aspiring candidates can visit the official website of the institute and fill out the admission enquiry form. For a step-by-stepNITTE Institute of Physiotherapy admission process, students can follow the steps listed below:
Step 1: Application
The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
Step 2: Selection rounds:
Appear for the institute-level selection rounds and then wait for the release of their results.
Step 3: Admission confirmation:
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institution.

courses_data.name: NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy MPT Admission 2025
courses_data.description: NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy also offers MPT programme in five different specialisations at PG level. The course duration of the programme is two years. Candidates must be physically fit at the time of admission and must obtain a medical certificate duly signed from a gazetted medical officer. Selection criteria:Admission to MPT is based on scores obtained in the last qualifying examination, followed by a PI round. review_summary.college_name: SR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Average college experience with poor placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are below expectations. Hardly 30-35 percent of students from my batch got placed and most of them in mass recruiters with low packages. The highest package is decent but only a handful of students get it. The average package is on the lower side compared to other institutes of similar fees. Companies like TCS Wipro Infosys and a few local startups visit but core companies are very rare. Internships are not provided to all; only a small group gets internships and mostly in non core roles. Overall the placement cell needs to improve connections and provide better opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty & industry focus.

content.Placements: Around 25% of students were placed, with the highest package at 3 LPA, the lowest at 2 LPA, and the average at 2.5 LPA. Top recruiters include Company Technook and Inspire Leap. 35% secured internships at companies in sales and marketing. Roles offered include Developer, Analyst, and Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good, and the infrastructure is also very good. Wi-Fi is available for students. Classrooms are very smart, and projectors are available. The library has lots of books, and every book is available for issue to the students. Hostel facility is good, and canteen snacks and meals are tasty and delicious.

admission_overview.college_name: SR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fees, Selection Process & Dates

admission_process.title: SR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow admission processfor the year 2025 has begun. Interested candidates must visit the official website to apply for their desired programme. The institute offers UG and PG courses in the fields of Management, Engineering and Vocational Studies via its constituent colleges. The SR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow admission criteria is both entrance-based and merit-based. The institute accepts various national-level or state-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, LUMAT, UPTU and more. Stay tuned to learn more aboutSR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow admission 2025.

SR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow admission criteria is entrance-based and merit-based. Candidates, who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria, are required to appear for the relevant entrance exam to get shortlisted for admission at SR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow. Students can check the eligibility and selections criteria from below:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Graduate in any stream with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised institute
85% seats: UPTU entrance exam
15% seats: Merit-based
Class 12 in PCM from a recognised board
Class 12 from a recognised board
Class 12 with a minimum 45% marks (40% for reserved category) from a recognised board
BTech in relevant stream

The admission process forSR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow coursesis online. Applicants are selected based on their merit and entrance exam scores. The accepted entrance exams include JEE Main, UPTAC, CUET, NTA, and others. To apply for admission, candidates must follow a step-by-step application process before the deadline. Firstly, they should fill out the application form with the required information, then select the desired course and pay the application fee. Finally, the applicants should submit the application form with all the necessary information. The step-wise SR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow admission process is mentioned below:

Application:The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.Selection rounds:Appear for the college/university/counselling body-based selection rounds and then wait for the release of their resultsAdmission confirmation:The shortlisted candidates are called for document verification once the selection rounds are done. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college/university.

hostel_campus.college_name: SR Group of Institutions (SRGI) Lucknow Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Average college experience with poor placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite average. Classrooms are not very well maintained, and labs lack updated equipment and proper software. Wi-Fi is available but not very reliable. The library has limited books, and seating space becomes an issue during exams. Hostel facilities are just manageable, with food quality in the mess being average and repetitive. Sports facilities are minimal. There are hardly any proper grounds for outdoor activities. Medical facilities on campus are also not very effective.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty & industry focus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good, and the infrastructure is also very good. Wi-Fi is available for students. Classrooms are very smart, and projectors are available. The library has lots of books, and every book is available for issue to the students. Hostel facility is good, and canteen snacks and meals are tasty and delicious.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities are not really good, but the placements are good.
reviews.review_text: It is good, including faculty, hostel, and canteen. All types of food are available in the canteen. Wi-Fi is not available for students. Sports are available, but only for first-year students, not for second and third-year students. Hostel food is very bad, and the taste is poor.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good placement.
reviews.review_text:
Labs are good, the class is good, and the library is clean.
Yes, there is good faculty, good and healthy food, and medicine available all the time. Sports, games, and hostel life are enjoyable. Studying with hostel games, healthy food, and medicine is available all day.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text:
You can consider things like the quality of food, hygiene, and other amenities. Here are some examples of what to include in a review:
Food quality: The food quality in the hostel is bad.
Hygiene: The mess in the hostel is not hygienic.
Amenities: The hostel has a gym, canteen, and medical facilities.
Wi-Fi: The hostel has WiFi.

reviews.review_heading: Will never recommend anyone to take admission there.
reviews.review_text: No WiFi, and they don’t allow the use of phones after 9 PM. So, we can't study after 9 PM. You can't leave the hostel in the middle of the year. If you have enrolled, you have to pay the complete year's fees even if you have been there for only a single day. The food is average.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied by training and placement cell.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. We had a clean campus. Computer labs were well-equipped. They had a good and clean environment. The canteen and mess were not hygienic and tasty. Taps and washrooms were clean. The bus service was excellent and affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Only educational institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is really nice. We have a separate block for the B.Tech CS branch, and Wi-Fi is available. There is a soft skills lab and well-equipped classrooms. AC is also provided, and the library section is spacious, allowing us to sit and spend our free time reading.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure facilities of the college are good. The infrastructure of our department includes Wi-Fi, best classrooms and the best library. The standard of facilities in our hostel is very high. Quality food is always available in the mess and the canteen. Medical, sports and games facilities are provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and teaching quality.
reviews.review_text: College has a very good infrastructure. It has a very good system in terms of free the Wi-Fi facility. On the other hand, the library has enough books to borrow. Food quality is good and tasty in the college’s canteen. Medical facilities are available. Other required facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities, but dissatisfied with the placement and feel.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is always available, as are a mess and canteen, a medical facility, a sports field, a library with a capacity of 150 students, and classrooms with a capacity of 100 students. Water supply and electricity supply with proper management are available. Almost all common facilities have proper management.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. Bathrooms are good. Our college buildings are good. There is a vast playground, library, football court, cricket ground, and a basketball court. The mess and canteen are good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are very good here as the college provides Wi-Fi facility in every building of the college. Students can use Wi-Fi for their project work. The library is available for about 24*7 for each student of the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent facilities and infrastructure. Almost all facilities are available. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The library is open 24X7.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best facilities compared to other colleges. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available in our college.

college_info.intro: Shobhit University Gangoh popular programmes are BTech and MA. BTech and MA students are placed in top companies in top sectors such as HCL, IBM, Info Edge India Ltd, Philips India, and others. BTech and MA students are taught technological skills, presentation skills, and various other skills necessary for their career development. BTech is provided in four specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, Agricultural Technology, Biomedical Engineering, and Biotechnology. BTech students after completing their education at this university, will be able to develop a strong understanding of the technological and scientific foundations of hardware, computing, and software methods and the various information and communication technologies. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Shobhit University Gangoh and their respective eligibility and Shobhit University Gangoh fee structure:

review_summary.college_name: Shobhit University Gangoh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of Shobhit University .

content.Placements: 30% of students were selected for placement from my course. The highest package was 1,200,000, and the average package was 500,000. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Google, HTC, and HP. 80% of students got internships from the course at HP. There are many roles in my course, requiring various skills.
content.Infrastructure: All faculty members are very friendly and cooperative. The infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi, labs, and a library are available on campus. Hostel facilities, including food, are below average. The canteen is also below average. Medical facilities are not provided on campus. Sports playgrounds are available, but no specific coaching is provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good college, good placement chances, best faculty, really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Most of the students get placements. The highest package in our college is around 12 lacs per annum, and the lowest is around 3 lacs per annum. TCS and Wipro are the top recruiting companies. Almost 50% of students got internships in our course. The top roles offered are full-stack developer and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Labs are large and newly built. Classrooms are clean and have smart boards. The library is big and has many books for students. The hostel is very clean, and the mess and canteen food is very good. There are good medical facilities and a big playground for every student.

placement_report.college_name: Shobhit University Gangoh Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Shobhit University Gangoh Placement overview
paragraphs: The highest and average package offered was INR 12 LPA and INR 3 LPA during Shobhit University Gangoh placements 2022 . The University recorded a 100% placement rate and over 400 companies visited the campus during Shobhit University Saharanpur placements 2022.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Shobhit University, Saharanpur?
faqs.answer: During the 2022 placement season, Shobhit University, Saharanpur, provided the highest package, INR 12 LPA. A B.Tech. (Computer Science and Engineering) student was given this package. INR 3 LPA was the average package provided during the postings in 2022. To put students in a variety of sectors, Shobhit University has a specialised placement unit that collaborates closely with businesses. Additionally, to assist students in getting ready for placements, the institution provides a variety of training and development programmes. Because of this, Shobhit University has a solid reputation for placing graduates in reputable businesses. Accenture, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL Technologies, Cognizant, and Capgemini are the leading employers at Shobhit University.

faqs.question: How are B Sc. placements at Shobhit University, Saharanpur?
faqs.answer: Having placed 60% of B Sc graduates in the past, Shobhit University in Saharanpur provides respectable placement possibilities. From Rs. 3 LPA to Rs. 8 LPA is the typical salary package. IFFCO, Asian Paints, Pioneer, Biostad, Bayer, Fortis, and FMC are among the top recruiters. The Career Counseling and Placement Cell, internships, and soft skill development programs are some of the options that B Sc. students can use to enhance their prospects. It is recommended that prospective students frequently examine the college's placement history by visiting the official website. In order to learn more about the college, prospective students want to think about stopping by the campus and chatting with other students.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shobhit University Gangoh Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Shobhit University .
reviews.review_text: All faculty members are very friendly and cooperative. The infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi, labs, and a library are available on campus. Hostel facilities, including food, are below average. The canteen is also below average. Medical facilities are not provided on campus. Sports playgrounds are available, but no specific coaching is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good college, good placement chances, best faculty, really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Labs are large and newly built. Classrooms are clean and have smart boards. The library is big and has many books for students. The hostel is very clean, and the mess and canteen food is very good. There are good medical facilities and a big playground for every student.

reviews.review_heading: The studies are average, and the placements also seem to be average.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about the department, it is very good, and the classrooms are also very good; one feels comfortable. Wi-Fi facility is provided, the library is also good, and the faculty here is very good. However, medical facilities and sports facilities are not provided, and the food quality in the hostel is much lower.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in this year, 2024.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in my department are very good, with amenities like Wi-Fi, AC, and fans, and the branches are premium for students. The food quality in the college canteen is rated as No. 1, and the water is purified with filters, providing drinkable water. Medical facilities are available at various points on campus.

reviews.review_heading: All the facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in Shobhit University Gangoh. Classrooms are well developed. Every equipment that is used in labs are available. Wi-Fi also available everytime. There are too many books in library. Medical facilities are available. There is a big play ground for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in our district.
reviews.review_text: We have many labs in our campus and they all are fully Wi-Fi connected. The food in both mess and canteen is very good in quality. The college conducts sports and games in every 2-3 months. Our college also conducts a programme named "NAVRANG" in which different types of activities are performed like dance, acting, games, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Shobhit University is the best. I recommend everyone to take admission.
reviews.review_text: It is an attractive campus with beautiful rooms. All the facilities, like sports and labs of all types, are available. They are good, especially the library, which is well-equipped with new books and spacious, so you can study there.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college & it is in my hometown.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The classrooms are well cleaned, huge with good furniture. We have a large playground. There is also a big auditorium and seminars is well conducted. There is a big library in the campus. We have huge and well-developed labs with all needed equipment and materials.

reviews.review_heading: Online classes are absolutely good in this pandemic.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good. Free Wi-Fi and online classes are available. Labs are excellent. The library is pretty good and provides books for students to take home. The hostel is good, and the food is hygienic. Sports and medical facilities are available and are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college, and they provide 100% placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was excellent. Only here I can see fruitful studies in UP in India. It is the best college. There were always running lectures, and the work in practical laboratories was very knowledgeable. For research in Shobhit University, you have all the equipment and chemical glassware was also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shobhit University, Gangoh.
reviews.review_text: There are three labs for agricultural students in the college. Classrooms have a huge space and are well decorated and furnished for good studies. College also has a huge library in which more than 1,000 books are available for agriculture students.

reviews.review_heading: Shobhit University is the best option for our career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. We have a large playground, and classrooms are well cleaned, huge with good furniture. There is also a big auditorium and seminars is well conducted. We also have a large water cooler in each corner of the department. The library on the campus is huge. We have huge and well-developed labs with all needed equipment and materials.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty. Good placement in 2015. Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The high-speed Wi-Fi facility is available. The classrooms are fully furnished. The condition of the classrooms is very good. The labs are also very good with all the necessary equipment. The library is not that good. The food in the campus is good. But the food in the hostel is very bad. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good because it is in my hometown.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is good. The building is in C-shape, with the big ground. There are all the facilities on the campus. There is a big library, week Wi-Fi facility, a large solar panel which provides the electricity continuously. There is a good security for safety. All the sports activities and the facilities are provided to the students. The management is good.

reviews.review_heading: Strong and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course is excellent with Wi-Fi enabled classrooms. It has well-equipped computer labs and a rich library. Hostels are clean, with good medical facilities. Mess food is decent. Sports facilities like cricket and badminton courts are available.
