college_info.college_name: Shobhit University Gangoh Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Through a comprehensive scholarship program, Shobhit University, Saharanpur, provides financial help to eligible B.Sc. students. The Chancellor's Scholarship offers a 20% tuition fee waiver to all deserving students. Wards of martyrs who lost their lives while serving are eligible for full tuition exemption under the Babu Vijendra Shourya Samman Scholarship. The Adarsh Women Empowerment Scholarship, which offers a 20% tuition fee discount, is available to female candidates. The National Integration Scholarship waives 20% of the tuition for students from Jammu and Kashmir and the Northeastern provinces. With the Merit-cum-Means Scholarship, students with outstanding academic standing and financial need might get a 50% tuition fee discount. The requirements for eligibility and the methods of applying for these scholarships may change. Check out the university website or get in touch with the admissions department.
Shobhit University Gangoh offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. The below-mentioned are Shobhit University Gangoh scholarships provided by the university:
Babu Vijendra Shourya Samman Scholarships

Shobhit University Gangoh fee for various courses ranges from INR 2.4 Lacs to INR 4.6 lakh. The fee is exclusive of various charges such as transportation charges, hostel charges. and various other charges. Students can buy the notes and books from the campus. For various other fee details please visit the official website of Shobhit University Gangoh.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 2 LPA. The average salary package is 4 LPA. highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the R.V.M. Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre:

reviews_list.review_title: RVM Medical College Telangana is good.

review_content.Placements: There is no package system in MBBS. There are other courses too. But go for MBBS. Nursing is okay. But MBBS will be very useful.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food quality is not good. Room is small, tho. 1st there was no lift, but this year a lift was built.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty is very cooperative. Exam is very difficult. The food quality is not good. Room is small, tho. 1st there was no lift, but this year a lift was built. The food quality is not good. Room is small, tho. 1st there was no lift, but this year a lift was built.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because the faculty and the patient flow in the college .

review_content.Placements: 250 members are present in our batch of year 2023 and our college have many patients by which we can SEE all the patients and improve our skills ant gain knowledge more about diseases internship is mandatory in MBBS which is provided by college itself .
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is present behind the college so their is no problem in going to college and the rooms are good and the only problem is water problem in the summer other than this their s no problem in college and hostel labs are good library is also present hear where we can study .

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, I can say that this college is best to study with a combined hospital.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students get placed. The highest package is above 3 LPA. The lowest salary is Rs. 50,000 per month. Top colleges such as Osmania, Gandhi, Apollo, Kamineni, Apollo, and other top private colleges hire students from the college. 99% of students got internships with a maximum stipend in our college. Roles like MD anesthesiologist, radiologist, general surgeon, and some roles related to medical research are offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure with central AC and good quality internet, and well-equipped labs. It also has a central library with an extensive collection of books, journals, and seminar rooms for workshops and presentations. There are clean, neat, and well-spaced rooms in the hostel. We get hygienic and nutritious food with veg and non-veg options and affordable pricing in the canteen. Basic healthcare facilities are available 24x7 and president doctors are often available for emergency purposes with ambulance service. Outdoor and indoor sports are along with inter-college competitions.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is good in teaching.

content.Placements: The highest percentage of students in the college is a minimum of 70% who are placed in the popular companies and get a minimum Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month salary. The companies should be given the job of assessing the student's knowledge and their qualifications.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good and all facilities are available like Wi Fi labs classrooms library and also the food facilities in the canteen. In the college mess canteen medical facilities and sports and games are also included.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the education our college provides.

content.Placements: Company that visited the campus last year was Mankind Pharma, Alkem Pharma, and many others. The salary packages offered can be based on the skills of the student. This college is best for the bachelor of pharmacy with the best facilities. The lowest salary package offered was approximately 1 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility was good but was not properly managed by them. Hostel infrastructure was good and the food served was also good and we had a daily menu changes and serve the food 4 times a day. In morning breakfast they serve poha and idly and there is a different menu for lunch eveytime.

faqs.question: What is the overall intake at MES Medical College for all courses together?

reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and patients. Campus spacious. Experienced faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Very high placements. About 5 LPA expected starting salary. Students can enter RMO jobs as soon as they graduate. The unemployment rate is low compared to other jobs. If you decide to go for post-graduation, your value as a professional increases multiple-fold.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hospital is good. Nice college. Spacious campus. Good enough facilities for recreational activities (sports and games). Hostel facilities could be better. The quality of food could be better. Hostel bathrooms are not clean. That could be better.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the facilities and infrastructure available at my college.

review_content.Placements: I am studying at MS medical college. There are hundred and fifty students in my class. Hundred percentage placement is assured. The highest package is for NRI quota and is of about twenty Lacs per year. The lowest package is for special reservation like SC, ST, and is free of cost.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a well-equipped classroom with well-maintained centralized air conditioning. Good and calm atmospheric library with all days availability. Hostel facilities are also good with good quality variety foods. 24-hour medical facility is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A good medical college, excellent faculty members, and academic quality.

review_content.Placements: Our batch consists of one hundred and fifty students. Later, after passing the first year, it reduced to one hundred and thirty-seven. The highest package for NRI students is 20 Lacs per year for 5 years, and the merit package consists of approximately 6.5 Lacs for our batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hospital infrastructure is developing day by day with centralized AC facilities in all lecture halls and clinical classrooms, with Wi-Fi facilities available in the hospital. We also have a well-ventilated library with an enormous number of good quality, up-to-date books, which even include postgraduate coaching books.

review_summary.college_name: MES Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Nice college with academics but only a few cultural programs.

content.Placements: In our course, everyone who passes gets the opportunity to do an internship at the same college hospital, which I’m sure is the case in every medical college. After the internship, students can either opt for doing postgraduation or can practice as general practitioners in hospitals. Placements are not actually provided by the college but are sought and chosen by the students themselves.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in the college include the hostel, gym, library for maximum reference, mess facilities, canteen facilities, and areas for sports like football, cricket, volleyball, badminton, basketball, throwball, etc. The food from the hostel is quite okay, but it is not very tasty. It is just satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching and facilities but not the expected colors of college life.

content.Placements: Actually, there are no placements here. Most students work here as medical officers (MOs) after completing the course, and our college provides a good salary. Some others prepare for NEET PG, while a small group enters other hospitals or goes abroad for further studies or jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has classrooms with smart class facilities, different labs, a dissection hall, Wi-Fi, demonstration and seminar rooms, etc. It also has a library with many medical books and a study hall. Hostel facilities are good compared to other colleges, with 4 or 3 people in one room, a mess hall, and a TV. The food is not bad, with non-veg daily. There are two football grounds, two basketball courts, a tennis court, etc.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and patients. Campus spacious. Experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: Very high placements. About 5 LPA expected starting salary. Students can enter RMO jobs as soon as they graduate. The unemployment rate is low compared to other jobs. If you decide to go for post-graduation, your value as a professional increases multiple-fold.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hospital is good. Nice college. Spacious campus. Good enough facilities for recreational activities (sports and games). Hostel facilities could be better. The quality of food could be better. Hostel bathrooms are not clean. That could be better.

The highest package is for NRI quota and is of about twenty Lacs per year. The lowest package is for special reservation like SC, ST, and is free of cost.
content.Infrastructure: We have a well-equipped classroom with well-maintained centralized air conditioning. Good and calm atmospheric library with all days availability. Hostel facilities are also good with good quality variety foods. 24-hour medical facility is available.

description: MES Malappuram cutoff 2024 for NEET SS is available on this page for admission to super speciality courses. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the MES Malappuram NEET SS cutoff 2024 for different courses, specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

MES Malappuram NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to DM course across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.
In the first round, MES Malappuram DM cutoff 2024 was 3086 for students in the General AI category. DM in Neurology was the toughest to get into.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 5865 for DM in Neurology. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 4620.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.

NEET SS is the accepting exam for MES Medical College admission to various Super Speciality Courses. Candidates appearing for NEET SS can refer to the table below to view the important NEET SS 2025 dates.
Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for MES Medical College. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

Candidates who appeared in the NEET SS entrance exam can refer to the table below for a comparative analysis of other specialisations available for admission at medical colleges that accept NEET SS for selecting students. The data below is for the General AI category students. Students can use the provided filters to choose other parameters, such as location, gender, and category, to do the comparison.

hostel_campus.college_name: MES Medical College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Nice college with academics but only a few cultural programs.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in the college include the hostel, gym, library for maximum reference, mess facilities, canteen facilities, and areas for sports like football, cricket, volleyball, badminton, basketball, throwball, etc. The food from the hostel is quite okay, but it is not very tasty. It is just satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching and facilities but not the expected colors of college life.
reviews.review_text: Our college has classrooms with smart class facilities, different labs, a dissection hall, Wi-Fi, demonstration and seminar rooms, etc. It also has a library with many medical books and a study hall. Hostel facilities are good compared to other colleges, with 4 or 3 people in one room, a mess hall, and a TV. The food is not bad, with non-veg daily. There are two football grounds, two basketball courts, a tennis court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and patients. Campus spacious. Experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hospital is good. Nice college. Spacious campus. Good enough facilities for recreational activities (sports and games). Hostel facilities could be better. The quality of food could be better. Hostel bathrooms are not clean. That could be better.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities and infrastructure available at my college.
reviews.review_text: We have a well-equipped classroom with well-maintained centralized air conditioning. Good and calm atmospheric library with all days availability. Hostel facilities are also good with good quality variety foods. 24-hour medical facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: A good medical college, excellent faculty members, and academic quality.
reviews.review_text: Hospital infrastructure is developing day by day with centralized AC facilities in all lecture halls and clinical classrooms, with Wi-Fi facilities available in the hospital. We also have a well-ventilated library with an enormous number of good quality, up-to-date books, which even include postgraduate coaching books.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college as it helps in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: My college gives me good infrastructure with well-educated, highly qualified faculty members with all-time availability. It also has a well-equipped, centralized air-conditioned classroom, 24-hour availability of a library, and well-developed and well-equipped laboratories.

reviews.review_heading: Academically one of the top 10 in India.
reviews.review_text: There are air-conditioned lecture halls available for each batch separately, a central library with most standard textbooks, Wi-Fi, and all medical laboratory settings. Hostel facilities are available separately for boys and girls, along with mess facilities, and a canteen is also present.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best in academic matters.
reviews.review_text: There is no free wifi, but labs, classroom facilities, and library facilities are good. We have almost all international textbooks, and it is open 18 hours a day. We have 4 members in each room and there is 24-hour electricity and good ventilation in room

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college as I am able to utilize every inch of this profession.
reviews.review_text:
There are well-equipped infrastructures.
There are comfortable classrooms with centralized air conditioners. A well-arranged library with 24-hour access. Hostel facilities are not really good; they are congested rooms. Tasty and healthy hygienic food and 24-hour medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed review about MES Medical College.
reviews.review_text:
Our college has good infrastructure, a new basketball court, well-maintained turf for football, badminton court, volleyball court, and an additional ground for cricket. Sports is well promoted here at MES.
We are also provided with a gym facility with separate timings for men and women.
There is a well-maintained library with a study hall present too.
There is no college-provided WiFi.
Classrooms are extremely large and can accommodate all the students in a batch adequately . It is equipped with...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college and would recommend it to others for good academics.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in the college, but it is accessible in the hospital and its vicinity. There is a large library available for all students. The infrastructure of the college is very old and small; it does not have a big campus. The hostel is quite poor, with four people in a room and very congested, but the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Highly satisfied with the medical services and the education quality.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is very poor, and Wi-Fi is not available in the hospital or the library. However, the food is better than at other hostels, and the medical facilities are excellent. The lecture halls have very good infrastructure, and the sports and games facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure, faculty members and the course in general.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers Wi-Fi service all around the campus. The classes have digital screens and AC services in the classrooms. We have a library that could accommodate a maximum of 150 students. Each department has their own concerned demo rooms and labs. The infrastructure is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: The college is okay with average infrastructure and good teaching facilities, good mess facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is congested, but the food is fine. The toilets are common, and there is a curfew at 8:45 p.m. There is a common mess that is within walking distance, and a canteen that serves affordable and hygienic food. There is a turf on campus where students can play sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good academics but average facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped lecture halls, demonstration rooms, labs, and museums with air conditioning, adequate lighting, and ventilation. The hospital has Wi-Fi, but it is not available on the campus. The library and reading room are in the same building. The hostel facilities are average, but the mess and canteen have good food. Students have free consultation and 50% concession for hospital facilities. The college encourages sports and has two football grounds, basketball courts, badminto...
